name_cn:
Size 21*16*7cm
Monogram! LV has released a new camera bag, better than the Nano Speedy! This unassuming little bag will captivate you the moment you pick it up. It's not just the cute look, but also the large capacity for its size! It's a new fall/winter runway piece, so it's rare, but I can tell you this bag is love at first sight. Its authenticity and quality are well-known!
